candidates.why: Direct revenue line from the income statement; preferred candidate and appropriate as top-line revenue.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.
Other operating income, not total revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl Extra Ordinary
candidates.why: Net income-related line, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the preferred candidate revenue line. Although 'Net revenue' also appears and matches concept, candidate list already contains a correct top-line revenue label, so no outside-candidate selection was needed.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and the main reported cost-of-sales amount.
Appears to be a subcomponent rather than the full COGS amount.
Also matches COGS and equals the main COGS amount, but 'Cost of Goods Sold' is more direct/preferred.
Inventory component, not an income statement expense line.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory component, not COGS expense.

variables.notes: Used the direct full-period COGS line and avoided the apparent subcomponent/lower-level duplicate.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead bucket for selling costs.
Appears to be a smaller subcomponent under selling expenses, not the full bucket.
Dedicated R&D line above EBIT; included in XSGA as well per rule so XSGA-XRD removes it if separate.
Clear operating overhead bucket for admin costs.
Operating overhead bucket; exclude D&A/impairments/finance items separately rather than totals.
Could be SG&A-related, but no indication it is the main reported overhead bucket here.

variables.notes: No explicit consolidated SG&A row is present. Selected the main identifiable overhead buckets and included 'Research & Development' as a separate above-EBIT operating expense so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D. Avoided 'Total Operating Expense' and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line located above EBIT; best match.
Only the D&A portion of R&D, not the full R&D expense.
Balancing row, not preferred.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D label exists above EBIT, so mapped it directly. Same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS per the subtraction rule.

candidates.why: Net/aggregate finance expense line; less preferred than granular recurring interest components.
Recurring interest-related financing cost.
Primary recurring interest expense line.
Recurring lease interest expense; should be included.
Hedging-related item, not core recurring interest expense; exclude.
Could include non-interest items and is empty here; not preferred.
Generic interest label but empty here and less specific than identified components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicates lease interest already captured by main statement line; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet debt, not expense.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest expense components and excluded FX-related items, hedge effects, and aggregate finance expense to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Net profit for the year attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for parent shareholders' equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity line, but less preferred because it may include non-controlling interests if present.
Balance sheet total, not equity attributable to owners.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity line to avoid any potential double counting with minority interest.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the provided balance sheet. Using empty mapping as instructed when the item truly does not exist.
